description_long: This is a stylized, compact red airplane with a rounded fuselage and exaggerated cartoon-like proportions. The body is predominantly red with silver-gray accents on the tail, propeller, and landing gear. The airplane features a single propeller at the nose, a bubble-style open cockpit with a single seat, and expressive painted eyes and teeth on the nose, giving it a characterful appearance. The wings are straight and low-mounted, extending horizontally from the fuselage, while the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The overall design is playful and simplified, suitable for animation or game environments.
description: A cartoonish red airplane with a single propeller, open cockpit, and expressive face details, featuring low-mounted straight wings and fixed landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular nose, spinning propeller, and wide straight wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the expressive face, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, cockpit opening, and tail configuration.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same facial features, cockpit, and landing gear as the left side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, unswept wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit with a bubble-style canopy and no visible enclosure.
